ticket.dm:
## Added To Ticket
You have been added to a ticket: ${channel} in **${guild}**
Please check the channel to help or discuss.

errors.mega_modal_missing:
## ❌ Error
Role Staff, Log, and Transcript channels are required.
errors.no_panels_found:
## ❌ Error
You haven't created any V2 panels yet. Please create a panel first using `/ticket panel create`.
errors.not_a_ticket:
## ❌ Error
This is not an active ticket channel.
errors.config_missing:
## ❌ Error
Configuration for this ticket type could not be found (it may have been deleted).
errors.transcript_channel_missing:
## ❌ Error
Transcript channel ({channelId}) not found. Closing failed.
errors.close_failed:
## ❌ Error
Failed to close the ticket.
errors.generic:
## ❌ Error
An error occurred while handling the command.
errors.missing_config_id:
## ❌ Error
Ticket configuration ID not found.
errors.invalid_config:
## ❌ Error
This ticket configuration is no longer valid.
errors.already_open:
## ❌ Error
You already have an open ticket for this type: <#{channelId}>
errors.create_failed:
## ❌ Error
An error occurred while creating your ticket.
errors.modal_show_failed_panel:
## ❌ Error
Failed to display the panel creation modal.
errors.modal_show_failed_type:
## ❌ Error
Failed to display the ticket type creation modal.
errors.panel_channel_required:
## ❌ Error
You must select a channel.
errors.panel_channel_invalid:
## ❌ Error
The selected channel is invalid or not a text channel.
errors.modal_show_failed:
## ❌ Error
Failed to display the setup modal. Please try again.
errors.no_message_id:
## ❌ Error
Could not find the original setup message. Please restart the setup.
errors.setup_expired:
## ❌ Error
Your setup session has expired. Please restart the setup.
errors.invalid_selection:
## ❌ Error
Invalid ticket selection. Please try again.
errors.only_staff:
## ❌ Error
Only staff members can claim this ticket.
errors.thread_channel_required:
## ❌ Error
You selected **Thread** style but did not provide a parent text channel. Please reconfigure this ticket type.

create.success:
## ✅ Ticket Created
Your ticket has been successfully created: {ticketChannel}

close.confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to close this ticket? This action cannot be undone.
close.thinking:
### ⏳ Please Wait
Preparing transcript and closing the ticket...

panel.start_desc:
Welcome to the Panel Setup Wizard! This process will help you create a new Ticket Panel, where users can open support tickets easily. You'll be able to choose where the panel is posted, give it a custom name, and add an optional description or image.

Click the **Start Panel Setup** button below to open the setup modal and begin configuring your new Ticket Panel.
panel.no_types: Use `/ticket type create` to add options to this panel.
panel.create_success:
## ✅ Success
Panel V2 created successfully in {channel}. Use `/ticket type create` to add ticket types to it.
panel.default_desc: Please select the type of ticket you need below.
panel.reload_success:
## ✅ Refreshed
Ticket panel `{id}` has been successfully updated.
panel.delete_success:
## ✅ Deleted
Panel **{title}** and all its ticket types have been deleted.

type.start_desc: Welcome to the Ticket Type Setup Wizard! Just press the **Start Setup** button below to begin configuring your new ticket type.
type.step2_desc: **Step 2**. Click the button below to configure staff roles, logs channel, transcript channel, and ticket category channel.
type.delete_success:
## ✅ Deleted
Ticket type **{typeName}** has been deleted.

type_create.success:
## ✅ Success
Successfully created the ticket type: {typeName}

v2.open_message_default: Hello {user}, staff <@&{staffRoleId}> will be with you shortly.

claim_modal.title: Close Ticket with Reason
claim_modal.label: What is the reason for closing this ticket?

claim.success:
## 🛄 Ticket Claimed
This ticket will now be handled by {user}.
claim.already_claimed:
## ❌ Error
This ticket has already been claimed by <@{userId}>.
